title: circular's holly jolly world
description: a simple vanilla+ modpack made for my friends
body:
![circular's holly jolly world logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f16502783d0dbb48b87e27556fb4c7f56dcb0f04.png)

# circular's holly jolly world

A simple vanilla+ modpack, centered around create 0.6 and origins, and designed with low-end hardware in mind.

Originally made for my friends, this modpack aims to provide a nice vanilla+ SMP experience. With various performance mods included such as Sodium, Lithium and FerriteCore, this modpack is designed to be run on low-end hardware, while also providing a beautiful experience for higher end hardware with Iris.

This modpack works perfectly fine with 4GB of ram allocated, however you can probably get away with even less.

KubeJS is also included for server admins who want to customise their experience even further. By default, a (difficult) recipe for the Origin Orb is included, however this can easily be modified.

## Features

- Build a fancy storage network with the latest 0.6 version of the Create mod
- Customise your gameplay experience with 31 unique origins
- Cast unique weapons and tools with Hephaestus, the fabric port of Tinker's Construct
- Tap into the natural plant magic around you with Botania
- Explore dozens of unique biomes with Biomes O' Plenty
- Uncover hundreds of unique structures and ruins with Philip's Ruins, YUNG's Extras and Structory
